Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF KIRSTEN FERRY Motion For Change Of Venue is granted. The case is transferred to San Mateo County. No opposition filed. All transfer fees to be paid by the plaintiff. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LAURA VOLZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. A first amended complaint was filed on February 16, 2016. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
